$:/languages/en-GB/plugins/uzvg/twks-det.title: $:/languages/en-GB/plugins/uzvg/twks-details/readme
$:/languages/en-GB/plugins/uzvg/twks-det.text:
!! 1. Introduction:

`twks.details` is a `details-like` collapsible panel component implemented using WikiText. It supports custom ''titles'', ''icons'', and CSS class names, and is suitable for scenarios where you need to ''collapse/expand content sections''.

The component uses a `state` tiddler to track whether it is expanded or collapsed, and supports specifying the default state via `initialState`. The trigger area and content area are independent, and the content is only rendered when expanded.

!! 2. Parameters:

| !Parameter | !Type | !Default | !Description |
|`summary`             |string        |`"Summary:"`                 |Title text displayed when collapsed |
|`collapsedSummary`    |string        |''(inherits summary)''       |Title text displayed when expanded; falls back to `summary` if not set |
|`expandIcon`          |Tiddler title |`$:/core/images/right-arrow` |Icon shown when collapsed (right-pointing arrow) |
|`collapseIcon`        |Tiddler title |`$:/core/images/down-arrow`  |Icon shown when expanded (downward arrow) |
|`initialState`        |string        |`"collapsed"`                |Initial state, either `"collapsed"` or `"expanded"` |
|`state`               |Tiddler title |`"$:/state/twks/details"`    |Tiddler used to store the current state |
|`triggerClass`        |CSS class     |`"twks-details-trigger"`     |CSS class for the trigger button (header) |
|`triggerWrapperClass` |CSS class     |''(none)''                   |CSS class for the outer wrapper of the trigger |
|`contentClass`        |CSS class     |`"twks-details-body"`        |CSS class for the content area |

!! 3. Usage Examples:

1. ''Basic usage:''

```wikitext
<$twks.details summary="Click to expand">
Content goes here.
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details summary="Click to expand">
Content goes here.
</$twks.details>

2. ''Custom title and icons:''

```wikitext
<$twks.details
  summary="Click to expand:"
  collapsedSummary="Click to collapse:"
  expandIcon="$:/core/images/chevron-right"
  collapseIcon="$:/core/images/chevron-down">
Here is the detailed content.
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details
  summary="View details:"
  collapsedSummary="Click to collapse:"
  expandIcon="$:/core/images/chevron-right"
  collapseIcon="$:/core/images/chevron-down">
Here is the detailed content.
</$twks.details>

3. ''Expanded by default:''

```wikitext
<$twks.details summary="Panel expanded by default" initialState="expanded">
This content is visible by default.
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details summary="Panel expanded by default" initialState="expanded">
This content is visible by default.
</$twks.details>

4. ''Using separate state tiddlers (recommended for multiple instances on the same page):''

```wikitext
<$twks.details summary="Panel A" state="$:/state/twks/details/panel-a">
Content of Panel A.
</$twks.details>

<$twks.details summary="Panel B" state="$:/state/twks/details/panel-b">
Content of Panel B.
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details summary="Panel A" state="$:/state/twks/details/panel-a">
Content of Panel A.
</$twks.details>

<$twks.details summary="Panel B" state="$:/state/twks/details/panel-b">
Content of Panel B.
</$twks.details>

5. ''Wrapping codeblock to fold and unfold code snippets:''

```wikitext
<$twks.details
  summary="Display Code:"
  state="$:/state/twks/details/1"
  collapsedSummary="Fold Code:"
  initialState="expanded">
  <$codeblock
    code="""SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false"""
    language="sql"/>
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details
  summary="Display Code:"
  state="$:/state/twks/details/1"
  collapsedSummary="Fold Code:"
  initialState="expanded">
  <$codeblock
    code="""SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false"""
    language="sql"/>
</$twks.details>

$:/languages/zh-Hans/plugins/uzvg/twks-d.title: $:/languages/zh-Hans/plugins/uzvg/twks-details/readme
$:/languages/zh-Hans/plugins/uzvg/twks-d.text:
!! 1. 简介：

`twks.details` 是一个使用 WikiText 实现的 `details-like` 可折叠面板组件。它支持自定义''标题''、''图标''和 CSS 类名，适用于需要''折叠/展开内容区块''的场景。

该组件使用 `state` 条目（tiddler）来跟踪展开或折叠状态，并支持通过 `initialState` 指定默认状态。触发区域和内容区域相互独立，内容仅在展开时才会被渲染。

!! 2. 参数说明：

| !参数 | !类型 | !默认值 | !说明 |
|`summary`             |字符串        |`"Summary:"`                 |折叠时显示的标题文本 |
|`collapsedSummary`    |字符串        |''（继承 summary）''         |展开时显示的标题文本；若未设置则回退到 `summary` |
|`expandIcon`          |条目标题      |`$:/core/images/right-arrow` |折叠时显示的图标（向右箭头） |
|`collapseIcon`        |条目标题      |`$:/core/images/down-arrow`  |展开时显示的图标（向下箭头） |
|`initialState`        |字符串        |`"collapsed"`                |初始状态，可选 `"collapsed"`（折叠）或 `"expanded"`（展开） |
|`state`               |条目标题      |`"$:/state/twks/details"`    |用于存储当前状态的条目 |
|`triggerClass`        |CSS 类名      |`"twks-details-trigger"`     |触发按钮（头部）的 CSS 类 |
|`triggerWrapperClass` |CSS 类名      |''（无）''                   |触发按钮外层容器的 CSS 类 |
|`contentClass`        |CSS 类名      |`"twks-details-body"`        |内容区域的 CSS 类 |

!! 3. 使用示例：

1. ''基础用法：''

```wikitext
<$twks.details summary="点击展开">
内容放在这里。
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details summary="点击展开">
内容放在这里。
</$twks.details>

2. ''自定义标题和图标：''

```wikitext
<$twks.details
  summary="点击展开："
  collapsedSummary="点击折叠："
  expandIcon="$:/core/images/chevron-right"
  collapseIcon="$:/core/images/chevron-down">
这里是详细内容。
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details
  summary="查看详情："
  collapsedSummary="点击折叠："
  expandIcon="$:/core/images/chevron-right"
  collapseIcon="$:/core/images/chevron-down">
这里是详细内容。
</$twks.details>

3. ''默认展开：''

```wikitext
<$twks.details summary="默认展开的面板" initialState="expanded">
此内容默认可见。
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details summary="默认展开的面板" initialState="expanded">
此内容默认可见。
</$twks.details>

4. ''使用独立的state Tiddler（推荐在同一页面使用多个实例时）：''

```wikitext
<$twks.details summary="面板 A" state="$:/state/twks/details/panel-a">
面板 A 的内容。
</$twks.details>

<$twks.details summary="面板 B" state="$:/state/twks/details/panel-b">
面板 B 的内容。
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details summary="面板 A" state="$:/state/twks/details/panel-a">
面板 A 的内容。
</$twks.details>

<$twks.details summary="面板 B" state="$:/state/twks/details/panel-b">
面板 B 的内容。
</$twks.details>

5. ''包裹代码块以折叠和展开代码片段：''

```wikitext
<$twks.details
  summary="显示代码："
  state="$:/state/twks/details/1"
  collapsedSummary="折叠代码："
  initialState="expanded">
  <$codeblock
    code="""SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false"""
    language="sql"/>
</$twks.details>
```

<$twks.details
  summary="显示代码："
  state="$:/state/twks/details/1"
  collapsedSummary="折叠代码："
  initialState="expanded">
  <$codeblock
    code="""SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted = false"""
    language="sql"/>
</$twks.details>

$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-details/stylesheets.title: $:/plugins/uzvg/twks-details/stylesheets/twks-details.css

$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-details/widgets/twk.title: $:/plugins/uzvg/twks-details/widgets/twks-details
$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-details/widgets/twk.text:
\widget $twks.details( summary:"Summary:", collapsedSummary, expandIcon, collapseIcon, initialState:"collapsed", state:"$:/state/twks/details", triggerClass:"twks-details-trigger", triggerWrapperClass, contentClass:"twks-details-body") \whitespace trim <$qualify name="stateTiddler" title=<>>
>> <$reveal type="match" default=<> state=<> text="collapsed" animate="yes"> <$button set=<> setTo="expanded" class=<>>   <$transclude $tiddler={{{ [!is[blank]else[$:/core/images/right-arrow]] }}} $mode="inline"/>   <> <$reveal type="match" default=<> state=<> text="expanded" animate="yes"> <$button set=<> setTo="collapsed" class=<>>   <$transclude $tiddler={{{ [!is[blank]else[$:/core/images/down-arrow]] }}} $mode="inline"/>   <$text text={{{ [!is[blank]else] }}} />
<$reveal type="match" default=<> state=<> text="expanded" animate="yes">
>> <$slot $name="ts-raw" />
\end
